beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_en: This will be the first ever meeting between Uzbekistan and Colombia. Uzbekistan’s only previous victory against a CONMEBOL side was in a March 2023 friendly versus Bolivia – they won 1-0 in Saudi Arabia with a goal from their all-time top scorer Eldor Shomurodov.
beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la toute première rencontre entre l'Ouzbékistan et la Colombie.

beIN SPORTS MAX 4.title_fr: Ghana vs Panama - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_en: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two  and lost one. Meanwhile, Panama’s sole World Cup match against an African side was a 2-1 defeat to Tunisia in the 2018 group phase.
beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_fr: Ce sera la toute première rencontre entre le Ghana et le Panama.

Saudi Arabia have a balanced FIFA World Cup record against CONMEBOL teams, with one win  and one defeat.

Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.

beIN SPORTS MAX 4.desc_en: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date. Nine of Morocco’s last 12 World Cup matches have come against European teams. In fact, no side has played as many WC matches against European opposition since the 2018 tournament as Morocco.

Barcelona have lost three of their last four away LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, suffering the same number of defeats as in their previous 1
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Le Real Oviedo a gagné 1-0 lors de son dernier match de Liga contre le FC Barcelone, disputé en mai 2001, et a la chance de remporter des matchs consécutifs de Liga contre les Blaugrana pour la première fois depuis avril 1961. Barcelone a perdu trois de ses quatre derniers matches de Liga à l'extérieur contre le Real Oviedo, subissant le même nombre de défaites que lors de son précédent match de Liga.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Chelsea vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 6
beIN SPORTS 2.title: تشيلسي vs برايتون هوف ألبيون - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2025/2026 الأسبوع 6
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: في جميع المسابقات، فاز تشيلسي بتسعة وخسر واحدة فقط من أصل 12 مباراة سابقة على أرضه أمام برايتون وهوف ألبيون، وفاز بآخر ثلاث مباريات على التوالي منذ الهزيمة 1-2 في أبريل 2023. وفاز برايتون بثلاثة من آخر ستة مواجهات له في الدوري مع تشيلسي، وذلك بعد عدم فوزه بأي من أول 14 مباراة مسبقًا.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Chelsea vs Brighton & Hove Albion - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 6
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: In all competitions, Chelsea have won nine and lost just one of their 12 previous home games against Brighton and Hove Albion, winning their last three in a row since a 1-2 reverse in April 2023. Brighton have won three of their last six league meetings with Chelsea, this after winning none of their first 14 beforehand.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Dans toutes les compétitions, Chelsea en a remporté neuf et n'a perdu qu'un seul de ses 12 derniers matchs à domicile contre Brighton et Hove Albion, remportant ses trois derniers matchs consécutifs depuis un revers 1-2 en avril 2023. Brighton a remporté trois de ses six dernières rencontres de championnat avec Chelsea, ceci après n'avoir remporté aucun de ses 14 premiers auparavant.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc: خسر توتنهام هوتسبير أربعة من آخر خمس مواجهات له في الدوري مع ولفرهامبتون منذ فوزه 1-0 في أغسطس 2022، وتلقت شباكه أكثر من هدفين في كل من آخر أربع مباريات ضدهم.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Tottenham Hotspur vs Wolverhampton Wanderers - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 6
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Tottenham Hotspur have lost four of their last five league meetings with Wolves  since a 1-0 victory in August 2022, conceding 2+ goals in each of their last four against them. Wolves have only lost two of their last eight Premier League visits to Tottenham Hotspur, avoiding defeat in their most recent two.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Tottenham Hotspur a perdu quatre de ses cinq dernières rencontres de championnat avec les Wolves depuis une victoire 1-0 en août 2022, concédant plus de 2 buts lors de chacun de leurs quatre derniers contre eux.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Newcastle United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 6
beIN SPORTS 2.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد vs أرسنال - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2025/2026 الأسبوع 6
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: فاز نيوكاسل يونايتد في آخر ثلاث مباريات على أرضه ضد أرسنال في جميع المسابقات دون أن تهتز شباكه أي هدف، بينما فاز آخر أربع مباريات متتالية على أرضه أمام أرسنال في أغسطس 1969. تحت قيادة ميكيل أرتيتا، خسر آرسنال مباريات خارج أرضه أمام مانشستر سيتي في جميع المسابقات أكثر مما خسر خارج ملعبه أمام نيوكاسل يونايتد.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Newcastle United vs Arsenal - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 6
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Newcastle United have won each of their last three home games against Arsenal in all competitions without conceding a single goal, while they last won four in a row at home to the Gunners in August 1969. Under Mikel Arteta, Arsenal have only lost more away games at Manchester City in all competitions  than they have away to Newcastle United.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Newcastle United a remporté chacun de ses trois derniers matchs à domicile contre Arsenal toutes compétitions confondues sans encaisser un seul but, alors qu'ils en ont remporté quatre de suite à domicile contre les Gunners en août 1969. Sous Mikel Arteta, Arsenal n'a perdu que plus de matchs à l'extérieur à Manchester City toutes compétitions confondues qu'à Newcastle United.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Les Championnats ATP 500 HSBC 2026 reviennent au Queen’s Club historique de Londres, l’un des tournois sur gazon les plus anciens et les plus prestigieux au monde.

beIN SPORTS MAX 3.title_fr: République Tchèque vs Afrique du Sud - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc_en: Czechia and South Africa are meeting at the World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter came in the Confederations Cup in 1997 – it ended 2-2 and notably included a brace of goals by Vladimír Šmicer. beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc_fr: La Tchéquie et l'Afrique du Sud se rencontrent pour la première fois en Coupe du monde.

beIN SPORTS MAX 3.title_fr: Canada vs Qatar - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc_en: This will be Canada and Qatar’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a September 2022 friendly in Vienna – Canada won 2-0 through goals from Cyle Larin and Jonathan David. Canada have won their last four matches played in Vancouver, scoring 17 goals and conceding only two. The last team to beat them in the British Columbia
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc_fr: Ce sera la première rencontre de Coupe du monde entre le Canada et le Qatar.

beIN SPORTS MAX 3.title_fr: Portugal vs RD Congo - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc_en: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Congo DR. Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc_fr: Ce sera la toute première rencontre entre le Portugal et la RD Congo.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: La Suisse et la Bosnie-Herzégovine se rencontrent pour la première fois en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.
